scopeStatus: within Phase 5A; no authorization-code UI, dynamic client registration, automatic scope challenge retry, remote Agent mesh, or real OpenAPI operation execution added
compatStatus: existing NONE and STATIC_BEARER MCP credentials remain covered; custom CredentialProviderPort override remains covered
retirementStatus: static-bearer-only MCP header injection widened to bearer-material semantics; static bearer path retained and tested
newRiskSignals: Cross-module credential contract and adapter auto-configuration change; raw secret/token leakage risk.
